diarized_transcript:
[Agent] Thank you for calling HoYoverse Player Support. How may I assist you today?
[Caller] Hi, I topped up 99 dollars yesterday and the Genesis Crystals never arrived.
[Agent] I'd be happy to help. For security purposes, could you please provide your UID?
[Caller] 832458917.
[Agent] Thank you. To verify identity on the account, could you confirm the HoYoverse email on file?
[Caller] knakamura at email dot com.
[Agent] Thank you. Identity verified. And could you provide the Order ID from your purchase receipt?
[Caller] ORD202604180001.
[Agent] I have your order. 99.99 USD on April 18th, Genesis Crystal package, Apple Pay. The payment cleared but delivery shows as pending. Per our top-up SOP I will now retry crystal delivery. Please hold one moment.
[Caller] Sure.
[Agent] Delivery retry has been submitted successfully. You should receive 6480 Genesis Crystals in your in-game mail within two minutes. Per policy, if they do not arrive within 24 hours please call back with this same Order ID and we will open a formal investigation.
[Caller] Got it, let me check. Yeah, they just arrived. Thanks.
[Agent] I am glad it resolved. Is there anything further I can assist with?
[Caller] No, that's all.
[Agent] Thank you for calling HoYoverse Player Support. Have a good day.
